violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sanitation buckets were observed at (0) parts per million (ppm). PIC changed out sanitation buckets and retested at 200ppm. According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The ice scoop is stored on the wire shelf next to the ice machine between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location/container. Ice scoop placed in clean container at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
